room.caption: [NightmareC1] If you played the demo, then you might remember how frustrating this level used to be.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(103) global.mapTeleport=3
abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2 global.hasShoes[1]=2 global.hasShoes[2]=2 global.canCharSwap=1 global.hasAbilToken[2]=4 global.activeAbility[1]=1 charSwitcher(1)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates) roomProg=instance_create(0,0,oGateCRoomProg)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(903) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=416 newMapY=192 toRoom=rMain_14Gate newDraw=1
stringToShow="Maybe your weapons can trigger that switch's shadow..." signSize=1
stringToShow="Hold up or down to work the switch." signSize=1
stringToShow="Shadows from traps are harmful to you." signSize=1
GID_SET(197992, self.id) ownerID=(197993) type=6 maxShadowDist=192 activated=0; timeLeft=15
stringToShow="These switches need to be hit quickly in succession." signSize=1
GID_SET(197997, self.id) ownerID=(197994) type=6 maxShadowDist=192 activated=0; timeLeft=15

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=64 newMapY=144 toRoom=rExtGateC_5 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,3) if instrProg!="7" and instrProg!="9" {instance_destroy()}
